title: BenchmarkTask
description: Task YAML contract reflecting benchmarks/cli-comparison/tasks/**/*.yaml. Automated scoring is binary eligibility-gate classification (PASS/FAIL/NO_OP/INFRA_FAIL/TIMEOUT): a trial passes only when every required eligibility gate passes. Task-level scoring weight maps and toolEvidencePolicy are non-operational (not consumed). Of networkPolicy, only allowed is consumed.

fixturePath.description: Relative fixture directory name under suite fixtures/

scoring.description: NON-OPERATIONAL. Not consumed by the harness. Historical/documentation-only weight maps must not be treated as automated scoring. Automated scoring is binary eligibility-gate classification only. Prefer omitting this block from new tasks.

toolEvidencePolicy.description: NON-OPERATIONAL. Not consumed by the harness. Prefer omitting this block from new tasks.

networkPolicy.description: Network confinement hint. Only networkPolicy.allowed is consumed by the harness; other nested fields (provenanceRequired, record, etc.) are ignored.

allowed.description: Only field consumed by the harness. When true, eligibility gates may use network under OS confinement.

substantiation.description: Evidence kind: test|tests (default evidenceGate=tests) or static/other requiring explicit evidenceGate|gate|oraclePath

artifactRef.description: Metadata-only evidence reference (test path/command or static script path). Not executed by evaluateRequirements; pass/fail comes from the bound evidenceGate/gate/oraclePath result.

evidenceGate.description: Explicit eligibility gate name that must pass to substantiate this item

gate.description: Alias for evidenceGate (explicit gate name binding)

oraclePath.description: Optional oracle path binding (relative to suite oracles/) for static/oracle evidence

gate.description: Gate name: baseline-diff, install, lint, tests, oracle, requirements, etc.

command.description: Exact literal shell command string; must not be rewritten by the harness

expectedExitCode.description: Defaults to 0 when omitted at load time

oraclePath.description: Commandless oracle: path relative to suite oracles/ only. Harness builds node|bash <absPath> under confinement; declared command is never rewritten.
